profile.name: Apple
profile.about: Apple Inc. designs, manufactures, and markets smartphones, personal computers, tablets, wearables, and accessories worldwide, with a growing services business (App Store, iCloud, Apple Music, and more). The company is undergoing its most extensive leadership transition since 2011: John Ternus will become CEO on September 1, 2026 (approved unanimously by the board), Tim Cook becomes Executive Chairman, and several long-tenured executives are retiring or changing roles across hardware, AI, legal, and finance. Apple is among the world's largest public companies by market capitalization (over $3.8 trillion as of early 2026), with institutional investors holding roughly 65% of outstanding shares.

people.name: John Ternus
people.title: Incoming CEO (from Sep 1, 2026)
people.bio: Currently SVP of Hardware Engineering. Will become CEO on September 1, 2026 after unanimous board approval; transitions from leading hardware engineering as he moves into the CEO role.

people.name: Tim Cook
people.title: Executive Chairman
people.bio: Transitioning from CEO to Executive Chairman; will assist with policy engagement globally. Largest insider holder (~3.28M shares, ~$853M as of Jan 2026).

people.name: Kevan Parekh
people.title: Chief Financial Officer
people.bio: Apple's CFO; recently reported record March-quarter revenue of $111.2B.

people.name: Craig Federighi
people.title: SVP, Software Engineering
people.bio: Leads iOS, macOS, and iPadOS. AI organization reports into this role following leadership changes.

people.name: Deirdre O'Brien
people.title: SVP, Retail + People
people.bio: Oversees human resources and Apple's global retail network (500+ stores).

people.name: Johny Srouji
people.title: Chief Hardware Officer
people.bio: Named Chief Hardware Officer; takes over Hardware Engineering from John Ternus as Ternus moves to CEO.

people.name: Jennifer Newstead
people.title: General Counsel (from Mar 1, 2026)
people.bio: Former Meta chief legal officer and former U.S. State Department legal adviser. Role combines legal and government affairs.

people.name: Amar Subramanya
people.title: VP, Artificial Intelligence
people.bio: Reports to Craig Federighi; appointed following retirement of AI chief John Giannandrea.

people.name: Luca Maestri
people.title: Outgoing CFO
people.bio: Served as CFO since 2014; departing as part of broader finance leadership transition.

people.name: Katherine Adams
people.title: Outgoing General Counsel
people.bio: Retiring late 2026; succeeded by Jennifer Newstead.

keyFacts.label: CEO transition
keyFacts.value: John Ternus → CEO Sep 1, 2026; Tim Cook → Executive Chairman

keyFacts.label: Board (2026)
keyFacts.value: Tim Cook, Wanda Austin, Alex Gorsky, Andrea Jung, Art Levinson, Monica Lozano, Ron Sugar, Sue Wagner

keyFacts.label: Top 3 passive influence
keyFacts.value: Vanguard + BlackRock + State Street >20% combined voting power

keyFacts.label: Fund: Vanguard Total Stock Market Index
Berkshire / Buffett note
keyFacts.value: Began buying 2016; peak position >$170B; significant reduction in 2024
